'''badïfnïf''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:nzimbu|nzimbu]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''inanimate''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| b-d-n
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:nzimbu|nzimbu]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| inanimate
|-
! Citation form
| badïfnïf
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || bædïfnïfth || bædïfnïfj || bædïfnïfsh || bædïfnïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || badïfdïfnïfth || badïfdïfnïfj || badïfdïfnïfsh || badïfdïfnïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || badïfnïfth || badïfnïfj || badïfnïfsh || badïfnïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || badïffnïffth || badïffnïffj || badïffnïffsh || badïffnïff
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for inanimate singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || badïfnïfïf || badïfnïfïf || badïfnïfïf || badïfnïfïf
|-
| [[Patient]] || badïfnïfth || badïfnïfj || badïfnïfsh || badïfnïf
|-
| [[Possessive]] || badïfnïfïfl || badïfnïfïfl || badïfnïfïfl || badïfnïfïfl
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || badïfnïfïfïf || badïfnïfïfïf || badïfnïfïfïf || badïfnïfïfïf
|-
| [[Dative]] || badïfnïfïfn || badïfnïfïfn || badïfnïfïfn || badïfnïfïfn
|-
| [[Speaker]] || badïfnïfïforo || badïfnïfïforo || badïfnïfïforo || badïfnïfïforo
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki inanimate nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|d176386}}
